overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat and hat exploring a snow-covered gothic castle courtyard at night. The character ascends multiple stone staircases and walks through atmospheric passages illuminated by warm lanterns against a dark blue winter sky, approaching a grand cathedral entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-dusted gothic courtyard with central drain

events.description: character approaches the base of the main staircase
moving from open courtyard into stairwell area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snow-dusted courtyard toward the grand staircase, passing stone benches and ornate lamps

notable_agents.action: white-clad figure standing motionless near the lamp post

entered.detail: massive gothic facade with pointed arches and spires rising in the background
cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light
cast iron lamp post illuminating the courtyard
large circular metal drain set in the stone pavement
stone bench with snow accumulation on the seat

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide, snow-dusted courtyard toward a massive gothic cathedral. Warm light from ornate lamp posts cuts through the cool blue darkness of the winter night. A motionless white figure stands near one of the lamps as the character approaches the base of the grand staircase.

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase
turning right at the landing to continue ascent

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper terrace, passing ornate lamps and stone balustrades

notable_agents.action: distant figure visible on the upper balcony overlooking the stairs

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps with snow residue on the edges
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars and snow dusting
tall stone wall with gothic detailing

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone staircase, the camera following closely as the gothic cathedral looms larger. Stone balustrades line the left side while a solid wall rises on the right. A distant figure can be seen on an upper balcony as the character turns at the landing to continue the climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace walkway with balustrades overlooking lower courtyard

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering open terrace area
following the curved path along the terrace edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace with views of the gothic spires and distant snow-covered trees

entered.detail: broad stone terrace with paved surface and snow drifts along the edges
snow-covered leafless trees visible beyond the balustrade
tall arched windows glowing with warm golden light from within
dark stone archway marking the entrance to a covered passage

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper terrace, the character walks along a curved path bordered by stone balustrades. Bare trees stand silent in the snow to the right, while the lit windows of the cathedral glow warmly to the left. The path curves toward a dark tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered passageway with stone walls

events.description: entering the dark tunnel passage as walls close in
green lantern light becomes visible at tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dimly lit stone corridor toward the distant green light at the exit

entered.detail: narrow stone corridor with rough-hewn walls and low ceiling
arched stone ceiling receding into darkness
eerie green glowing lamp marking the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dark tunnel where the sky disappears above. Stone walls press in on both sides as the character walks toward a distant green light that marks the exit. The atmosphere shifts from open terrace to claustrophobic passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty staircase leading to grand cathedral entrance

events.description: exiting the tunnel into a misty open area with grand stairs
ascending the final staircase toward the illuminated entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the mist-covered steps toward the glowing cathedral entrance, flanked by ornate lamps

entered.detail: broad stone steps leading up to the cathedral entrance, covered in mist
massive gothic doorway with warm light emanating from within
circular stained glass window above the entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the character emerges into a misty atmosphere and begins ascending the final grand staircase. The cathedral entrance looms ahead, its rose window and arched doorway glowing with warm inviting light. Ornate lamp posts line the approach as the character climbs toward the building's entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, snow-covered courtyard into the claustrophobic depths of a stone passage before emerging at the glowing entrance of a gothic cathedral. It begins with the character crossing a blue-toned winter courtyard illuminated by ornate lamp posts, passing a motionless white figure before ascending a grand stone staircase. As the character reaches the upper terrace, the scene opens up to a curved path bordered by bare trees and glowing windows, which then narrows sharply as the camera follows the character into a dark, oppressive tunnel. The atmosphere shifts from this enclosed stone corridor toward a distant green light, finally breaking open into a misty exterior. The movement concludes as the character climbs a final set of stairs toward the cathedral's rose window and arched doorway, which radiate a warm, inviting light against the night.
